// Webhook Header Auth already validates x-gda-key before this workflow runs.
return $input.all();

parameters.name: postedFrom
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(Date.now() - 30*24*60*60*1000); return (d.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getDate().toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getFullYear(); })() }}

parameters.name: postedTo
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); return (d.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getDate().toString().padStart(2,'0') + '/' + d.getFullYear(); })() }}

parameters.name: keywords
parameters.value: IT services cybersecurity systems engineering simulation training software

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_opportunity_tracker (name, opp_title, dept, level_1, level_2, agency, naics_code, set_aside, estimated_value, response_deadline, data_source, solicitation_number, govtribe_id, source_url, place_of_performance, gda_score, gda_label, eis_fit_score, stage, last_refreshed) VALUES ('{{ ($json.name || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,500) }}', '{{ ($json.opp_title || $json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,500) }}', '{{ ($json.dept || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.dept || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.level_2 || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.agency || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0,500) }}', '{{ $json.naics_code || "" }}', '{{ ($json.set_aside || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.estimated_value || 0 }}, {{ $json.response_deadline ? "'" + $json.response_deadline + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.data_source || "SAM.gov" }}', '{{ $json.solicitation_number || "" }}', '{{ $json.govtribe_id || "" }}', '{{ $json.source_url || "" }}', '{{ ($json.place_of_performance || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.gda_score || 0 }}, '{{ $json.gda_label || "MONITOR" }}', {{ $json.eis_fit_score || 0 }}, 'Identified', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (solicitation_number) DO UPDATE SET gda_score = GREATEST(EXCLUDED.gda_score, gda_opportunity_tracker.gda_score), gda_label = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.gda_score > gda_opportunity_tracker.gda_score THEN EXCLUDED.gda_label ELSE gda_opportunity_tracker.gda_label END, last_refreshed = NOW()
